summary: Add Mesopotamian sources: Epic of Gilgamesh (Thompson 1928, 12 tablets) + Adapa and the Food of Life (1912)

resolution.note: Added Epic of Gilgamesh (12 tablets, Thompson 1928) + Adapa (Rogers 1912) to the mesopotamian corpus via the pipeline (acquire/chunk/graph_bootstrap/embed). 49 new chunks embedded; validate_index passes; retrieval smoke test surfaces gilgamesh-tablet-11 as top hit for the plant-of-immortality query. Concept tagging + edge proposals deferred to the next review-gated LLM batch.
